import { useMemo, useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import Navbar from '../shared/Navbar'; import Footer from '../shared/Footer'; import { spaces } from '../data/spaces'; import TourModal from '../components/TourModal'; function useFavorites() { const [fav, setFav] = useState(() => { try { const raw = localStorage.getItem('wn:favorites'); return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : []; } catch { return []; } }); useEffect(() => { localStorage.setItem('wn:favorites', JSON.stringify(fav)); }, [fav]); const toggle = (id) => setFav((prev) => (prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter((x) => x !== id) : [...prev, id])); return { favorites: fav, toggle }; } export default function Details() { const { id } = useParams(); const space = useMemo(() => spaces.find((s) => s.id === id), [id]); const { favorites, toggle } = useFavorites(); const isFav = favorites.includes(id); const [tourOpen, setTourOpen] = useState(false); if (!space) { return (
